name: Yokoji Zen Mountain Center
description: Yokoji Zen Mountain Center is a residential Zen training center located on 160 acres in the San Jacinto Mountains near Idyllwild, California. Founded in 1999 by Tenshin Fletcher Roshi in the lineage of Taizan Maezumi Roshi, it offers retreats, residential training, and a seminary program. The mountain setting provides a contemplative environment for deepening Zen practice.
